surface_verification.justification: Framework CI tooling: hardens the warn-only diff-coverage CI gate (measure_diff_coverage.py --fail-under wrapper + ci.yml). There is no target-app runtime UI/web/CLI surface to exercise. The gate's fail-path IS exercised end-to-end against the real diff-cover by shared/scripts/tools/tests/test_measure_diff_coverage_gate.py::TestGateRealDiffCover (synthetic git repo -> under-covered line -> exit != 0 + report). The only truly-external bit (does GitHub's continue-on-error keep the JOB green while the STEP is red) is untestable locally and was observed live in PR #324.

behaviors.behavior: decide_gate returns FAIL when diff% < threshold
decide_gate returns PASS at and above threshold
decide_gate returns PASS on an empty (measured) diff (None)
gate entrypoint: under-covered changed line -> exit != 0 (FAIL) + report printed (real diff-cover)
gate entrypoint: covered changed line -> exit 0 + report printed (real diff-cover)
gate entrypoint: produced report shows no changed lines under coverage -> exit 0 (parity with diff-cover)
gate fails CLOSED (distinct ERROR exit) when diff-cover produces no report (crash/unavailable)
behaviors.evidence: test_measure_diff_coverage_gate.py::TestGateMeasurementFailure::test_no_report_produced_fails_closed PASSED (also validated at the real ci.yml invocation layer: bad compare-branch -> rc=3)

behaviors.behavior: gate fails CLOSED on an unreadable --diff-cover-json report
run_diff_cover uses the non-deprecated comma-combined --format json:...,markdown:... flag (no --json-report/--markdown-report)
behaviors.evidence: test_measure_diff_coverage.py::TestRunDiffCover::test_parses_report_from_subprocess (stub asserts --format) + real diff-cover produces both files in TestGateRealDiffCover PASSED

behaviors.behavior: run_diff_cover clears a stale persistent report so a failed run is not mistaken for success
ci.yml gate step calls the wrapper, stays warn-only (continue-on-error), pins diff-cover, re-raises the exit
CI-gate guard still classifies the wrapper step as a gate; live workflows + allowlist stay consistent (no stale entry)
diff-cover is version-pinned (10.3.0) in the ci.yml gate + shared-tests provisioning
GitHub Actions continue-on-error keeps the JOB green while the STEP shows a red FAILURE annotation
behaviors.reason: requires a live GitHub Actions runner; cannot be reproduced locally. Observed live in PR #324's CI run.
